_comment: REVERSION Pipeline Configuration - Values from configuration.json verified against pro Indian trading research
_description: Mean reversion plays (failure fade, volume spike reversal, gap fill, liquidity sweep)

time_windows._comment: From configuration.json time_policy + research: 09:15 start, avoid 11-12 (36.6% WR worst), golden hour 14:30-15:30

extension._comment: ALIGNED TO BASELINE: vwap_reclaim min_distance_bps: 30 (0.30%), max_distance_bps: 200 (2.0%)

rsi_extremes._comment: REVERTED: oversold_threshold 30→35 as stricter threshold killed profitable setups

quality._comment: From configuration.json - min_t1_rr: 1.2. UPDATED: 0.8→1.2 to require higher quality setups

quality_thresholds._comment: UPDATED: Increased thresholds - require more exhaustion/extension for reversion plays

chop._comment: Research: Mean reversion excels in chop. 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF per baseline

trend_up._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: counter_trend min_strength set to 0

trend_down._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: counter_trend min_strength set to 0

volume_capitulation._comment: From configuration.json - sweep_min_volume_surge: 2.0 for ICT sweeps

vwap_reclaim_volume._comment: DATA-DRIVEN (Dec 2024): VWAP_RECLAIM vol<50k: 18 trades (6W, 12L), blocking = +2,675 Rs improvement
vwap_reclaim_volume._evidence: Low volume VWAP reclaim trades have poor execution and high slippage. Blocking vol<50k improves P&L by +2,675 Rs

validated_filters._comment: CROSS-RUN VALIDATED FILTERS (Dec 2024) - Consistent across backtest_20251204 and backtest_20251205

long_trade_volume._evidence: Winners have 2x volume (213k vs 107k). Min 150k improves long trade quality

volume_spike_reversal_short_filter._comment: DATA-DRIVEN (Dec 2024): Volume + regime filter for volume_spike_reversal_short
volume_spike_reversal_short_filter._evidence: vol>=10x + regime!=trend_up: 20 trades, 70% WR, +4,913 Rs, 246 Rs/trade (vs baseline 54% WR, 68 Rs/trade). Counter-trend shorts in trend_up are disasters (44% WR, -93 Rs avg).

setup_filters._comment: DATA-DRIVEN (Feb 2026): 3-year edge optimizer analysis (618K trades, FY2022-26)

vwap_mean_reversion_long._evidence: 124 trades, WR 43.5%, Rs -0.86L loss, negative ALL FYs with data.

volume_spike_reversal_long._comment_adx: P1: Block reversals in strong trends (ADX>30 = continuation, not exhaustion)
volume_spike_reversal_long._evidence: 3yr backtest: large_cap N=304, WR 52%, Avg -Rs 92. Overall profitable, block large_cap only.

volume_spike_reversal_short._comment_adx: P1: Stricter for shorts — fading upward momentum in strong uptrend is more dangerous
volume_spike_reversal_short._evidence: 3yr backtest: trend_down N=212, WR 52%, Avg -Rs 98. Other regimes profitable (chop 59%, trend_up 59%).

gap_fill_short._disabled_reason: VC whitelist gate is the primary filter now

gap_fill_long._evidence: 244 trades. trend_up WR 42% Rs -880. hour 10 WR 48% Rs -495. mid_cap WR 45% Rs -182.
gap_fill_long._disabled_reason: VC whitelist gate is the primary filter now

failure_fade_long._audit_re_enable_note: Re-enabled per audit/09-failure_fade_structure.md (2026-04-15). Pre-rebuild evidence may be contaminated by old levels-dict bug + no cap-block. Plus structural NSE long-bias makes spring (long fade) ~10pp weaker than upthrust (short fade) — known canonical asymmetry, not detector bug. Letting wide-open gauntlet decide on regenerated post-fix data.
failure_fade_long._pre_rebuild_evidence: PRE-REBUILD (informational only): 3yr deep_edge Rs -1,137 avg, 48 trades, negative ALL FYs. Generated under no OOS protocol with bugs in detector and contaminated by absence of cap-block.

vwap_mean_reversion_short._evidence: 3yr deep_edge: Rs -231 avg, 74 trades. Negative overall.

global_filters._comment: UNIFIED GLOBAL FILTERS - Applied to all setups before setup-specific filters

short_min_adx._rationale: Disabled for reversion - ADX not required for mean reversion plays

rsi_dead_zone._rationale: Disabled - RSI extremes enforced in screening for reversion

entry._comment: WIDENED (Dec 2024): 0.15->0.3 ATR, min_zone_pct 0.25->0.30. Zero-trigger setups had 0.10-0.15% zones.

mode_overrides._comment: DATA-DRIVEN (Dec 2024): failure_fade had 20% trigger rate with retest - price moves AWAY from entry after fail. conditional triggers immediately if within zone.

targets._comment: From configuration.json - failure_fade target_mult_t1: 1.0, t2: 2.0, vwap_mean_reversion t1: 1.0, t2: 1.5

vwap_based._comment: VWAP reversion targets based on distance to VWAP

qty_splits._comment: 60-40 split to match OLD config - T3 disabled (0%)

stop_loss._comment: DATA-DRIVEN: 3.5x ATR (Feb 2026 edge optimizer: P90 MAE of winners = 5.56x, intermediate step from 2.0). failure_fade stop_mult 1.5 handled at setup level.

rsi_penalty._comment: REVERSION: Penalize neutral RSI (35-65) - need extreme exhaustion
